arts.ttl: Eventful final days of window possible with Tottenham keen on Breel Embolo
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are being linked with Breel Embolo, as French newspaper L’Equipe reports the final days of the window could be eventful for the forward and his club AS Monaco. The 27-year-old has made 26 appearances for Monaco so far this season, rarely playing the full 90 minutes for his club. arts.sum: On the eve of Inter's Champions League clash against Monaco, Inter manager Simone Inzaghi addressed the media at the customary press conference in Appiano Gentile. The coach touched upon various topics, including team selection, player fitness, and the club's financial situation. arts.ttl: Monza Secure Inter Defender Palacios on Loan
arts.sum: Monza have completed the loan signing of Tomas Palacios from Inter Milan, marking another strategic move in their quest to escape Serie A relegation. The 22-year-old Argentine defender will join the club on a six-month loan deal, with Monza set to cover his entire salary.
